original_text: Key growth drivers for Adobe center on AI monetization opportunities and expanding market tailwinds. RBC Capital sees long-term AI monetization upside for Adobe, suggesting the company is well-positioned to capitalize on AI integration in creative and experience tools [C015]. The Motion Graphics Market growth trajectory (12.2% CAGR to 2034) indicates favorable industry dynamics for Adobe's creative products [C010]. Similarly, the Web Conferencing Market expansion (8.40% CAGR 2025-2034) suggests continued demand for Adobe's collaboration tools [C014]. A bullish thesis on Rebound Capital's Substack highlights Adobe's attractive valuation metrics, with trailing and forward P/E ratios of 22.89 and 15.41 respectively as of mid-August 2025 [C013]. However, specific details on recent partnerships, acquisitions, or new market entries are not covered in the provided evidence, limiting analysis of strategic initiatives beyond AI integration [C002].

changes_summary: Corrected citation IDs to match available evidence: C015 to C107 (RBC Capital), C010 to C102 (Motion Graphics), C014 to C106 (Web Conferencing), and C013 to C105 (Rebound Capital). Removed the unsupported '8.40% CAGR' figure from the Web Conferencing Market claim as it was not present in chunk C106. Retained C002 for the limitation statement.
